name: Kingston FURY Renegade RGB 16GB (2x8GB) DDR4 4266Mhz Memory Kit - 8Gbit DRAM Density - PC4-34100 - CL19 - 1.4V - Unbuffered - non-ECC - 288-Pin DIMM (KF442C19RBAK2/16)
